summary: Load Guard / Kill Switch feature fully tested. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). The Load Guard system provides graded degradation modes (NORMAL->STRESSED->SEVERE->CRITICAL) with rolling-window trend detection, queue-class aware admission control, hysteresis recovery, and comprehensive admin controls. All endpoints work correctly with proper admin-only access (403 for non-admin). Backward compatibility with existing system health and guardrail endpoints confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: admission_controller.py: Well-structured LoadGuard class with 4 graded modes (normal, stressed, severe, critical) aligned with degradation_matrix.py. Uses 30s rolling snapshots with MAX_SNAPSHOTS=20 for trend detection.

admission_controller.py: Queue-class aware with 8 queue types (text, image, video, audio, export, webhook, analytics, batch). Each queue has weight_class (light/medium/heavy) with different wait time thresholds.

admission_controller.py: Hysteresis recovery requires RECOVERY_HOLD_S=180 seconds of sustained healthy metrics before stepping down one mode. Escalation requires ESCALATION_SUSTAIN_S (120-180s depending on target mode).

admission_controller.py: Admin controls include set_manual_mode(), set_auto_enabled(), set_premium_bypass() with full audit logging. Audit log stores last 100 entries with timestamps and admin identifiers.

admission_controller.py: check_admission() returns structured AdmissionResult with admitted flag, reason, retry_after_sec, load_level, affected_job_types, queue_position, eta_sec, and degraded_max_scenes.

system_health_api.py: /load-guard GET returns comprehensive status including guard_mode, signals (saturation, queued, processing, depth_trend), per_queue status, config, recovery state, escalation state, and audit_log.
system_health_api.py: /load-guard POST handles set_mode, set_auto, set_bypass actions with proper validation. Invalid mode returns 400, invalid action returns 400.

system_health_api.py: /load-guard/decisions returns recent admission decisions with full metrics context (timestamp, user, plan, job_type, decision, admitted, guard_mode, queue_depth, processing, saturation_pct).

pipeline_routes.py: Uses check_admission() with job_type='STORY_VIDEO' which maps to 'video' queue (weight_class='heavy'). Returns structured 429 with error='admission_rejected', message, retry_after_sec.
comic_storybook_v2.py: Uses check_admission() with job_type='COMIC_STORYBOOK' which maps to 'image' queue (weight_class='medium'). Returns 503 when admission rejected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Load Guard / Kill Switch system is fully operational. Admin endpoints at /api/admin/system-health/load-guard provide full status and control. Guard modes (normal, stressed, severe, critical) correctly block free users based on job weight class. STORY_VIDEO maps to 'video' queue (heavy), COMIC_STORYBOOK maps to 'image' queue (medium). All admin actions are logged in audit_log. Backward compatibility with /api/admin/system-health/overview and /api/observability/guardrail-state confirmed.
